titleStmt.title: SII 17.163: original edition by K. G. Krishnan
No. 163. (A.R. No. 143 of 1904.) TIRUKAṆṬHĒŚVARAM, CUDDALORE TALUK, SOUTH ARCOT DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the east and north bases of the central shrine in the Naṭanapādēśvara temple.

This inscription records the gift of 6 kāśu and 12 mā by Kumāramuḻāṉ Arumoḻi Tirumāppēṟan alias Śiṅgaḷānta[ka*]-mūvēndavēḷāṉ of Iḍaiyāṟu for 4 sandhi lamps to god Tirukkaṇṇīśvaram-uḍaiya Mahādēva in Śōḻakulavallinallūr in Paṭṭāṉpākkai-nāḍu in Gaṅgaikoṇḍaśōḻa-vaḷanāḍu. The money was distributed among the śivabrāhmaṇas Tirunīlakaṇṭaṉ Tiruvēkambam-uḍaiyāṉ of Bhāradvāja-gōtra, his brothers Tirukkaṇṇīśvaram-uḍaiyāṉ, and Kuṉikkum-Pirāṉ. Tiruoṟṟikaṇḍaśivaṉ and Sundaraṉ Tirukkaṇṇīśvaram-uḍaiyāṉ.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . kulottuṅka coḻatevarkku yāṇṭu 2 10 9 Āvatu kaṅkaikoṇṭacoḻa vaḷanāṭṭu paṭṭāṉpākkaināṭṭu coḻakula
vallinallūrt tirukkaṇṇīśvaramuṭaiya mahādevarkku Iṭaiyāṟṟuk kumāramuḻāṉ Arumoḻi tirumāppeṟanāna ciṅkaḷāntakamuventa
veḷāṉ Ittevarkku Upaiyamāka vaitta san=ti viḷakku 4 I viḷakku nālum Erikka Upaiyaṅkoṇṭa Ikkoyiṟ śivabrāhmaṇaril bhāradvāji tirunilakaṇṭaṉ
tiruvekampamuṭaiyāṉum Ivaṉ tampi tirukkaṇṇīśvaramuṭaiyāṉum Ivan tampi kuṉikkum pirāṉum koṇṭa kācu nālaraiye muṉṟu māvukku Erikka kaṭava
santi viḷakku Iraṇṭarai tiruoṟṟikaṇṭacivaṉ kācu Araiye muṉṟumākkoṇṭu Erikkakkaṭava santiviḷakku Araiyum cuntaraṉ tirukkaṇṇīśvaramuṭai
yāṉ koṇṭa kācu Oṉṟe Āṟumāk koṇṭerikka kaṭava san=ti viḷakku Oṉṟum Āka san=ti viḷakku nālum santrātittavat Erikka kaṭavatāka Ivaṉatu Upaiyaṅ
koṇṭu kalveṭṭuvittom Ivvaṉaivom .
Digital edition of SII 17.163 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
